+using ModelContextProtocol.Server;
+using System.ComponentModel;
+
+namespace McpStdioServer;
+
+[McpServerPromptType]
+public sealed class SummarizePrompt
+{
+    [McpServerPrompt("summarize"),
+     Description("Generates a prompt that asks an LLM to summarize the given text.")]
+    public static IList<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage> Summarize(
+        [Description("The text content to summarize.")] string text,
+        [Description("Optional desired length: 'brief', 'detailed', or 'bullet-points'. Defaults to 'brief'.")]
+        string style = "brief")
+    {
+        var systemInstruction = style.ToLowerInvariant() switch
+        {
+            "detailed" => "Provide a thorough, multi-paragraph summary that preserves key details.",
+            "bullet-points" => "Summarize the text as a concise bulleted list of key points.",
+            _ => "Provide a concise one-paragraph summary."
+        };
+
+        return
+        [
+            new(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatRole.System, systemInstruction),
+            new(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatRole.User, $"Please summarize the following text:\n\n{text}")
+        ];
+    }
+}
+

The project builds successfully. Here's a summary of what was created in `McpStdioServer/`:

**3 files:**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Program.cs` | Host setup — registers stdio transport, DI-based `HttpClient`, and auto-discovers tools/prompts. Logging is redirected to **stderr** via `LogToStandardErrorThreshold = LogLevel.Trace` so JSON-RPC on stdout is never corrupted. |
| `ApiFetchTool.cs` | `fetch_api_data` tool — accepts a relative `path` parameter, calls the external API via `IHttpClientFactory` (injected by DI), and returns pretty-printed JSON. |
| `SummarizePrompt.cs` | `summarize` prompt — takes `text` and an optional `style` (`brief`/`detailed`/`bullet-points`), returns a system+user message pair for LLM summarization. |

**To run:** `dotnet run --project McpStdioServer`  
**To configure in a client** (e.g. Claude Desktop), point the stdio command at the built executable.
